improvement: Independent fail-closed verification of the Cloudflare deployment evidence manifest.

verified_behavior.route: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical source
cases: detect source commit and workflow run substitution
reject missing, extra, reordered, or manifest-digest-altered evidence entries

evidence_strength: deterministic source behavior; not deployment evidence
privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, commit identifiers, abstract verification results, and no credentials, private chat, health material, or secret values.
limits: The verifier is not yet wired into the authoritative deployment workflow.
No Cloudflare Pages deployment or resolving URL was produced.
Digest integrity proves byte identity, not scientific truth or trusted authorship.
falsification_route: Alter one packet byte, source commit, run identifier, evidence set, ordering, or manifest digest and confirm the verifier exits non-zero.
